variations.prompt:
Use the uploaded portrait photo(s) as identity reference and the uploaded bedroom display photo as scene and pose reference.

Create a photorealistic image inside the yellow-themed bedroom display shown in the scene reference.

Preserve the exact environment, including the yellow walls, bed frame, yellow cartoon pillows, grey blanket, zig-zag patterned bedsheet, decorative signboard, floor, lighting, perspective, framing, camera angle, and overall composition.

The number of people in the generated image must exactly match the number of uploaded identity reference photos.

* If 1 identity photo is provided, generate 1 person.
* If 2 identity photos are provided, generate 2 people.
* If 3 or more identity photos are provided, generate the exact corresponding number of people arranged naturally within the scene.

All faces must closely match their respective reference photos. Preserve facial features, hairstyle, skin tone, facial structure, and identity.

Preserve the original clothing, outfit, accessories, colors, textures, logos, and overall appearance from each identity reference photo. Do not change, replace, redesign, recolor, or generate different clothing. Each person must wear exactly the same outfit shown in their respective reference image.

Use the scene reference as a pose reference.

Replicate the exact pose, body orientation, leg placement, head angle, hand placement, framing, and composition from the scene reference.

For a single person:

* Stand in front of the bed.
* Face directly toward the camera.
* Look directly into the camera.
* Maintain a relaxed natural smile.
* Right leg supporting body weight.
* Left leg crossed naturally in front of the right leg.
* Slight head tilt matching the reference.
* One hand holding the decorative signboard beside the face at approximately shoulder height.
* Other arm relaxed naturally.

For multiple people:

* Arrange all subjects naturally in front of the bed.
* Everyone faces the camera.
* Maintain balanced spacing.
* Keep poses similar to the reference style.
* Ensure all subjects are fully visible.

IMPORTANT:
Do not create a sleeping pose.
Do not place the subject on the bed.
Do not generate a walking pose.
Do not generate a candid pose.
Do not make the subject look downward.
Do not rotate the body sideways.
Do not crop the legs.
Do not alter the clothing.
Do not change the environment.

Copy the exact body orientation, leg position, head angle, camera-facing posture, and overall composition from the scene reference. Change only the identity of the person.

Professional exhibition photography, photorealistic, ultra-detailed, realistic shadows, realistic skin texture, realistic fabric texture, natural lighting, high resolution, shallow depth of field, magazine-quality image.

Portrait orientation, 9:16 aspect ratio.

Use the uploaded portrait as the identity reference and the uploaded red retro music room image as the scene, composition, and pose reference.Preserve the exact composition, exact camera angle, exact perspective, exact framing, exact body position, exact head angle, exact subject scale, and exact spatial placement from the reference image.The person MUST remain standing upright in the same position as the original subject. Full body visible. Feet touching the floor. Do not sit, kneel, squat, crouch, lean on the floor, or change the pose in any way.The scene is a small enclosed retro music room with bright red walls, decorated with vinyl records, vintage posters, music-themed artwork, metal handrails, and a disco ball mounted on the ceiling.The camera is positioned directly above the subject, looking straight downward from the ceiling using an ultra-wide fisheye lens. Maintain the same dramatic top-down perspective distortion, lens compression, room geometry, and visual depth as the reference image.The person is looking directly upward toward the camera with a natural cheerful smile. Maintain realistic eye direction matching the original reference.Keep all wall decorations, vinyl record placements, posters, handrails, disco ball, lighting, shadows, reflections, room proportions, and environmental details exactly as shown in the reference image.Replace only the identity of the original subject with the uploaded portrait while preserving every other visual element.Photorealistic, ultra-realistic skin texture, accurate facial features, highly detailed clothing, realistic lighting, realistic shadows, realistic reflections, DSLR photography, professional photoshoot quality, sharp focus, vibrant colors, natural depth of field.IMPORTANT:- Exact pose match- Exact composition match- Exact framing match- Exact camera angle match- Exact fisheye lens perspective match- Standing pose only- Full body visible- No sitting- No kneeling- No crouching- No squatting- No pose alteration- Change only the person's identityVertical portrait orientation, 9:16 aspect ratio, high resolution, social media ready, ultra detailed.

Use the uploaded portrait photo(s) as identity reference and the uploaded giant pink claw machine image as the scene and composition reference.Create a highly realistic, photorealistic image inside the giant pink claw machine display filled with fluffy pink teddy bears. Preserve the exact composition, exact camera angle, exact framing, exact perspective, exact lighting, exact subject scale, and overall appearance of the original scene.The number of people in the generated image MUST exactly match the number of uploaded identity reference photos.If 1 reference photo is provided:* Generate 1 person standing naturally in the center of the claw machine display.If 2 reference photos are provided:* Generate 2 people standing naturally side-by-side inside the claw machine display.* Both people must be fully visible.* Equal visual prominence for both subjects.If 3 or more reference photos are provided:* Generate all people together inside the claw machine display.* Arrange them naturally and evenly throughout the available space.* Keep every face clearly visible.* Maintain balanced composition.* Do not hide or crop any subject.Preserve the exact facial features, hairstyle, skin tone, body proportions, and identity of each person according to their respective reference photo.The subjects are standing among oversized fluffy pink teddy bears inside the display. A large metallic claw hangs directly above them, matching the original scene.Maintain:* Exact claw position* Exact teddy bear placement and density* Exact pink color palette* Exact background design* Exact reflections and highlights* Exact perspective distortion* Exact room proportions* Exact display structureIMPORTANT:* Full body visible for every subject* Standing pose only* No sitting* No kneeling* No crouching* No floating* No pose distortion* No extra people* No missing people* No face replacement errors* No changes to the scene composition* Do not crop any subjectAll subjects should appear naturally integrated into the environment, interacting realistically with the teddy bears and display elements.Professional studio photography, ultra-realistic skin texture, realistic shadows, realistic reflections, highly detailed fabric and clothing, premium commercial photography quality, ultra-sharp focus, vibrant colors, realistic depth of field.Preserve 100% of the original scene layout and composition. Change only the identities of the people.Vertical portrait orientation, exact 9:16 aspect ratio, high resolution, social media ready, premium advertisement quality.
